## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website performance, and upcoming changes.](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Slight dip in website traffic (sessions & engaged sessions) observed, aligning with broader internet trends](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [5 new AI/efficiency-focused articles to be published by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Imubit transitioning from WordPress to Webflow, with developer starting migration tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Workforce research data now available; to be incorporated into future content](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Topics

### Website Performance Update

  - [Slight drop in sessions and engaged sessions after weeks of growth](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Trend observed across multiple accounts, possibly due to Google metric changes](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Despite dip, overall trend remains positive](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [5 new articles in production, focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
    1.  AI process optimization (oil & gas)
    2.  Mineral recovery efficiency
    3.  AI-driven process efficiency (cement)
    4.  Polymer reactor optimization
    5.  Compressor surge margin
  - [Emphasis on efficiency and AI applications in various industries](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Workforce research data now available for incorporation into future content](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Imubit Platform Capabilities

  - [Question raised about inputting feedstock price data (non-real-time) into Imubit](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Tara to verify with Tim if CSV upload for price analysis is possible](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### Website Migration to Webflow

  - [Project kickoff meeting scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Developer to programmatically move existing content](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Custom theme chosen, with room for additional features](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Potential new features discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Sidebar with anchor headings for improved navigation and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Progress bar for article readability](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Strategic placement of table of contents and promotional content](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Hosting Changes

  - [Plans to move to Pantheon for improved uptime and reliability](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to review workforce research data and incorporate into upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Tara to verify with Tim about CSV upload capability for feedstock price analysis](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [GrowthX team to share best-in-class blog template examples for developer reference](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Tara to kick off Webflow migration project and keep team updated on progress](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Team to reconvene next week for regular sync](https://fathom.video/share/apESPxkwzrtrvRjNxJWe4qvQ8rtNrFM3?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
